/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,-Bsymbolic-functions -shared -Wl,-soname,libprotoCore.so.1 -o libprotoCore.so.1.1.0 CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/Cell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/Double.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/LargeInteger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ParentLink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoByteBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ModuleCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ModuleProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ModuleResolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoMethodCell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProviderRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoSpace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoRootSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoSparseList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoString.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/SymbolTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoTuple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/Thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoExternalPointer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoExternalBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/ProtoMultiset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protoCore.dir/core/Integer.cpp.o
